name: Vibe-Skills
desc: Vibe-Skills is an all-in-one AI skills package. It seamlessly integrates expert-level capabilities and context management into a general-purpose skills package…
descFull: Vibe-Skills is an all-in-one AI skills package. It seamlessly integrates expert-level capabilities and context management into a general-purpose skills package， enabling any AI agent to instantly upgrade its functionality—eliminating the friction of fragmented tools and complex harnesses.
